title: Education ke sath 6.5 Lakh income reality 😨😨
description:
Apply for the Polaris Admission Test (July intake) Now: https://tinyurl.com/3578h2h3

Medhavi Skills University, in collaboration with Polaris School of Technology, offers a future-forward, industry-led 4-year Integrated B.Tech in Computer Science (AI/ML) — built for students who want to build, not just learn.

Polaris Students Are Breaking Records:
 🚀11 selections in Google Summer of Code (GSoC)
🚀 4 selections in Summer of Bitcoin and 2 in LFX
🚀 18 students bagged internship offers worth 2 Lakh+ in the first year itself
